claims.statement: Channel Tunnel length is at least 5× larger than Lærdal Tunnel length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km. Lærdal Tunnel length: 24.51 km.

claims.statement: Speed of sound in water is faster than Peregrine falcon dive.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Speed of sound in water: 5328 km/h. Peregrine falcon dive: 390 km/h.

claims.statement: Suez Canal length is shorter than Panama Canal length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Suez Canal length: 193 km. Panama Canal length: 82 km.

claims.statement: There are more squares on a chessboard than bones in an adult human body.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 64 squares vs 206 bones.

viz.labelB: bones in an adult human body

claims.statement: Barcode first scanned happened after Telephone patented.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. Barcode first scanned: 1974. Telephone patented: 1876.
